summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: normalize_scope_for_reporting() correctly maps scope3_3 → scope3_amont and scope3 → scope3_amont/scope3_aval. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Dashboard now correctly aggregates emissions from granular scopes (scope3_3, scope3) into reporting scopes (scope3_amont, scope3_aval).
critical_code_review_comments: normalize_scope_for_reporting() correctly handles all scope mappings: scope1→scope1, scope2→scope2, scope3_3→scope3_amont, scope3→scope3_amont/scope3_aval based on category
Dashboard /api/dashboard/summary correctly uses normalize_scope_for_reporting() to aggregate emissions
Fiscal comparison /api/dashboard/fiscal-comparison also uses normalize_scope_for_reporting() for consistent reporting
SCOPE3_AMONT_CATEGORIES and SCOPE3_AVAL_CATEGORIES sets correctly define category mappings for scope3 generic activities

success_rate.backend: 100% (27/27 tests passed - 9 from test_dashboard_scope_normalization.py + 9 from test_multi_impacts.py + 9 from test_ghg_protocol_rules.py)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix for dashboard scope normalization fully verified. The normalize_scope_for_reporting() function in /app/backend/routes/dashboard.py correctly maps granular scopes to reporting scopes. Test file test_dashboard_scope_normalization.py covers all mapping scenarios.

normalize_scope_for_reporting_function.scope3_3_to_scope3_amont: PASS - scope3_3 (amont énergie) always maps to scope3_amont
normalize_scope_for_reporting_function.scope3_to_scope3_amont_for_amont_categor: PASS - scope3 with deplacements_professionnels maps to scope3_amont

dashboard_api_summary.scope_emissions_structure: PASS - Returns 4 keys: scope1, scope2, scope3_amont, scope3_aval
dashboard_api_summary.scope3_3_counted_in_scope3_amont: PASS - Verified with Chaudière mazout 100k MJ test
dashboard_api_summary.scope3_counted_in_scope3_amont: PASS - Verified with Scooter 1k pkm test

scope3_entry_scooter_1k_pkm.dashboard_scope3_amont_increase: 96852.45 kgCO2e (scope3 correctly mapped for amont category)

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Dashboard scope_emissions only had 4 keys (scope1, scope2, scope3_amont, scope3_aval) but activities could have scope3_3 or scope3, which were not being counted
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: No normalization function to map granular scopes to reporting scopes
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added normalize_scope_for_reporting() function that maps scope3_3 → scope3_amont and scope3 → scope3_amont/scope3_aval based on category
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - All test scenarios pass, dashboard correctly aggregates all scope emissions
